# =============================================================================
# Python backend dependencies.
# Versions use compatible ranges so the dependency tree stays solvable
# across copilotkit's own (changing) constraints AND across other deps
# in the same environment (e.g. internal corporate packages with their
# own pins). For a fully-locked production deploy, generate a lockfile
# via `pip freeze > requirements.lock`.
# =============================================================================

# --- Web framework ----------------------------------------------------------
# Floors are deliberately old. Our code uses no fastapi feature newer than 0.95.
# No upper bound — let the resolver pick whatever co-installed packages need.
fastapi>=0.95
uvicorn[standard]>=0.20
python-multipart>=0.0.6

# --- CopilotKit runtime -----------------------------------------------------
# Tested working: 0.1.74 (Python 3.10–3.12) and 0.1.88+ (Python 3.13).
# Versions 0.1.40–0.1.87 declare Python <3.13 only.
copilotkit>=0.1.74,<0.2

# --- LangChain / LangGraph (transitive deps of copilotkit) ------------------
# copilotkit 0.1.74's loose pins let pip pull a 1.x langchain that breaks
# with `cannot import name 'ExecutionInfo' from 'langgraph.runtime'`.
# Capping at <2 keeps 0.1.74 importable without changing 0.1.88 behavior
# (0.1.88 already requires langchain>=1 and won't see this constraint).
langchain<2
langgraph<2

# --- Config / typing --------------------------------------------------------
# copilotkit 0.1.88 needs pydantic-core>=2.35 (pydantic 2.11+).
# 0.1.74 is happy with pydantic 2.10+. Range covers both.
pydantic>=2.10,<3
pydantic-settings>=2.5
python-dotenv>=1

# --- LLM SDKs (optional — only the one matching LLM_PROVIDER is used) -------
openai>=1.30
anthropic>=0.20

# --- Logging ----------------------------------------------------------------
structlog>=23

# --- Testing & evals --------------------------------------------------------
# httpx floor lowered for environments with older co-installed packages.
pytest>=8
pytest-asyncio>=0.24
pytest-cov>=4
httpx>=0.24
pyyaml>=6

# --- Dev tooling ------------------------------------------------------------
ruff>=0.1
mypy>=1
